event.summary: Team assignment — server on types/server/CLI, client on React UI, fixtures on test data/config

event.text:
Server Agent Plan: Tasks #1 and #2

Task #1 (shared types) must be done first since #2 is blocked by it. I will implement both sequentially:

1. Task #1: src/shared/types.ts + src/shared/parse.ts
2. Task #2: src/server/watcher.ts, processor.ts, journal.ts, server.ts

After task #1 is complete, I will message fixtures and client so they can start using the types.

types.ts: All shared type definitions per handoff doc — RawInboxMessage, RawTaskData, AgentInfo, TeamConfig, TeamState, TaskInfo, ChatEvent discriminated union, SessionState, card types, JournalEntry, ParsedSystemEvent.

parse.ts: tryParseSystemEvent, isLeadAgent, generateEventId, parseTimestamp, isWithinWindow utilities.

processor.ts: Message classification, broadcast detection (500ms hold), idle suppression (30s), task claim correlation (120s), dependency cascades, DM/thread detection.

server.ts: Bun.serve with GET /state + WS /ws.
event.summary: Server plan: types first, then watcher/processor/journal/server sequentially

event.text: Server plan looks solid. Adopting types from handoff doc with good additions — id field on PresenceChange/TaskUpdate for client keying, JournalEntry wrapper for replay, raw filesystem types. Broadcast detection with 500ms hold window, idle suppression with 30s threshold, task claim correlation with 120s scan. All matches spec. Approved.

Client Agent Implementation Plan

Blocked on task #1 (shared types, server working on it). Once #1 lands, I execute #4 then #5 sequentially.

File Structure:
src/client/index.html, App.tsx, types.ts (client-only), components/ (ChatMessage, SystemEvent, ThreadBlock, ReactionRow, PlanApprovalCard, PermissionRequestCard, TaskSidebar, TaskCard, PresenceRoster, SessionStats, NewMessageIndicator, AgentAvatar, MessageList, Header), hooks/ (useWebSocket, useChatReducer, useAutoScroll, useRelativeTime), styles/index.css

Design: useReducer with ChatEvents dispatched from WebSocket. HYDRATE action for initial GET /state. Auto-scroll with 100px threshold. Dark theme (gray-950/900/800, indigo-600). All animations via CSS transitions. Lead messages right-aligned, teammate left-aligned, system centered. DM threads as collapsible ThreadBlock. Reactions as Slack-style pill rows.
event.summary: Client plan: 18 components + 4 hooks, blocked on shared types

event.text: Client plan looks good — design decisions are solid. useReducer with ChatEvents, HYDRATE for initial state, auto-scroll with chatscope's proven pattern, dark theme with Linear/Raycast feel. All CSS transitions, no JS animation overhead. Correctly noted dependency on #1. Approved.
Blocked on task #1 — shared types not yet created. Waiting for server to finish types.ts.
event.summary: Client blocked, waiting on shared types

event.text:
Fixtures Agent — Implementation Plan

Tasks Assigned:
- #6: Create fixture generator for healthdash-sprint (no blockers)
- #7: Write package.json, tsconfig.json, and README (no blockers)
- #8: Write integration tests (blocked by #2 server processor + #6 fixture generator)

Phase 1: #6 and #7 in parallel (start immediately)

#6 — Fixture Generator: config.ts (5 members), tasks.ts (8 tasks with dependency chains + 17 state transition snapshots), events.ts (~40+ transcript entries including 4 broadcasts, 7 DMs across 3 threads, system events), generate.ts (routes events to correct inbox files).

#7 — Package Config: package.json (name teamchat, bin config, Bun runtime), tsconfig.json (strict, ESNext, react-jsx), README.md (quick start, hook config, CLI reference).

Phase 2: #8 Integration Tests (after #2 + #6 complete): 6 test files covering processor ordering, broadcast detection, DM threads, idle suppression, task cascades, reactions.
event.summary: Fixtures plan: generator + config immediately, tests after server processor

event.text: Fixtures plan is solid. Good coverage — 40+ events from the transcript, all message types represented. Phase 1 can start immediately since #6 and #7 have no blockers. Approved.
server is idle — stuck in plan mode loop

Plan already approved multiple times. Implementing tasks #1, #2, #3 sequentially:
1. src/shared/types.ts + parse.ts (shared types)
2. src/server/watcher.ts, processor.ts, journal.ts, server.ts
3. bin/teamchat.ts (CLI + replay)

event.text: Approved — implementing now
event.summary: Server acknowledges (but still stuck in plan mode)

event.text: Already approved — implementing tasks #1, #2, #3 now.

The agents are stuck in a plan mode loop — the mode: "plan" parameter is re-engaging plan mode after each approval. Shutting down all three and respawning without plan mode. All plans already reviewed and approved.
